case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. SHARON DUNHAM et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNHAM, SHARON $3,026.05 PRINCIPAL, $583.84 INTEREST, $181.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,790.89, DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $100.00 DUE ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-13-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUNHAM, SHARON
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT DUNHAM, SHARON

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATIONS OF VENUE AND REDUCED FEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DUNHAM, SHARON DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-09-2013
